violations.description: Global CSS '* { outline: none; }' removes all focus indicators, making keyboard navigation impossible.
violations.reference_fix: Remove 'outline: none' from universal selector. Add: *:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #333; outline-offset: 2px; }

violations.description: Main navigation uses non-semantic <div> elements instead of <nav> with <a> or <button>. Div elements are not keyboard-focusable and have no navigation landmark role.
Header icon links (🔍, 👤, ♡, 🛒) use emoji with no aria-label. Screen readers cannot determine the purpose of these links.
violations.reference_fix: 🔍 👤 ♡ 🛒

violations.description: Color selection swatches are div elements with only a title attribute and no role or aria-label. They are not keyboard-accessible and screen readers cannot interact with them as controls.
violations.reference_fix: <button class="color-dot" style="background:#2c3e50;" aria-label="Select Navy color" role="radio" aria-checked="false"></button>

violations.description: Quick View overlay is only accessible on mouse hover via CSS. Keyboard users and screen reader users cannot activate this functionality.
Newsletter email input has no associated label element, only placeholder text.
violations.reference_fix:
<label for="newsletter-email" class="sr-only">Email address</label>
<input type="email" id="newsletter-email" placeholder="Your email address">

page_description: A luxury fashion e-commerce homepage with announcement bar, header icons, mega navigation, hero section, product grid with color swatches and hover-only quick view, newsletter signup, and footer. Multiple accessibility issues across navigation, interactive elements, and form controls.
